title: astrantia major var. biebersteinii
intro: Astrantia major var. biebersteinii, also known as Masterwort, is a perennial plant native to Europe and Asia, characterized by its delicate white flowers and fern-like foliage. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, burns, and skin conditions. The plant's health benefits include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and act as an expectorant to relieve respiratory problems. Astrantia major var. biebersteinii can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
